root.sql:
select to_number(to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'yyyy'))+543 as contract_year ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'mm') as contract_month ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'month') as contract_month_thai ,count(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no) as count_conno ,sum(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount) as loan_approve_amount
,nvl((select sum(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount - sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount_not) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det where sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.seq_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_status != '2' and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = to_number(to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'yyyy')) and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'mm') ),0) as punctual_amount --ตามกำหนด
,nvl((select sum(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount - sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount_not) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det where sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.seq_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_status = '2' and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = to_number(to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'yyyy')) and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'mm') ),0) as return_amount --คืนใบเสร็จ
,nvl(( select sum(sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt where to_number(to_char( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,'yyyy')) = to_number(to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'yyyy')) and pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , 'mm') = pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'mm') and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'CLR' --หักกลบ ),0) as prematurely_amount --ก่อนกำหนด
from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_history where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type and (sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '1' or sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_focus = '1') /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract between '01/01/2023' and '12/07/2023' group by to_number(to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'yyyy')) ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'month') ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'mm')
order by to_number(to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'yyyy')) asc ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'mm') asc /*สร้างรายงานตัวนี้ขึ้นมาเพื่อให้มีตรวจตาม TOR เท่านั้น ไม่มีฝ่ายไหนใช้ ฝ่ายบัญชีก็ไม่ใช้ ฉะนั้นข้อมูลอาจจะไม่ถูกต้องตามที่ควร แต่ถ้าจะใช้งานจริงๆ ตรวจก่อนให้ลูกค้าใช้*/
